name: Old Fashioned Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, salt, baking soda, ground ginger, crystallized ginger, and allspice. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream together brown sugar and butter until smooth. Add egg and molasses, then beat until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, stirring just until combined. Do not overmix.
5. Chill dough for 1 hour at room temperature.
6. Shape dough into balls about 1 inch in diameter. Place on ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 25 minutes. Transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface to cool.
